untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit identification of failed flag pattern formation and its top/bottom levels. The pattern detection itself (failed flag with prior trend, price break and reversal confirmation) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators without access to pattern recognition logic. Pivot levels (r1/s1) are used as proxy resistance/support but do not capture the specific multi-bar flag geometry described in the source text.
translation_notes: Context-dependent direction handled with both entry_long and entry_short conditions. Long entry triggers on price crossing above resistance (r1) after downtrend failure. Short entry requires initial breakdown below support (s1) followed by upside reversal cross. Exit conditions use reverse logic. Pattern-specific confirmation (entire pattern retrace) cannot be operationalized with provided indicators.
